The Huntrix Meal is a limited-time McDonald's collaboration item launched on March 31, 2026, inspired by the Oscar-winning Netflix animated film KPop Demon Hunters.  It features a 10-piece Chicken McNuggets combo including a medium drink and Ramyeon McShaker Fries seasoned with soy, garlic, sesame, and spice.  The meal includes two signature dipping sauces: Hunter Sauce (a sweet chili with garlic and pepper notes) and Demon Sauce (a spicy purple mustard with heat and tang).
